prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为高热推荐；临床医学、数学/统 计为推荐；法学、金融/财经/经济为分化观望；土木建筑为分化观望；生化环材为一般观望。该校物理类招生以计算机类、电子信息类、临床医学等热门工科和医学专业为主，整 体专业结构偏热。云南省2026年高考总报名人数约377900人，较2025年（历史类112406+物理类173282=285688人）大幅增长约32.3%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约229200人，考 生规模显著扩大将加剧位次竞争。；云南大学位于省会昆明，是云南省唯一211高校，本地招生占比极高（2025年物理类计 划1447人中绝大多数面向本省），本省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好稳固。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21863名、2026年扩招约10.8%、本 省考生规模大幅增长约32%加剧竞争、声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次。预测最低位次约23477名，区间22 977–23977名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group (including science from 2021-2024 and physics category in 2025) were 13638 → 12684 → 20191 → 17436 → 21863, showing a fluctuating and declining trend. In 2023, due to a 30-point drop compared to 2022, the ranking sharply fell to 20191, rebounded to 17436 in 2024, and further declined to 21863 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 4427 positions over the past two years, indicating intensifying competition. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Yunnan Province has been continuously expanding: 768 in 2021 → 635 in 2022 → 897 in 2023 → 1065 in 2024 → 1447 in 2025 → 1603 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan increases by 156 students, an increase of about 10.8%, showing a clear expansion trend, which theoretically will push the ranking number higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years: 83rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2022 → 80th in 2023 → 70th in 2024 → 69th in 2025 → 71st in 2026, consistently among the top 80 nationally, with strong competitiveness among comprehensive universities in the Southwest region. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly because the university's published employment data showed that the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%, raising public concern about employment quality. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranked 62nd (rated as 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity score of 524656, and popularity has fluctuated significantly in recent years (relatively hot in 2023, very hot in 2024, average in 2025). There are no records of admission cut-off gaps. The overall somewhat negative reputation may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+ (top in the country), Ecology was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, totaling three disciplines rated A- or above. Ethnology corresponds to the enrollment major Ethnology (Donglu Campus), Ecology corresponds to Environmental Science and Engineering and Ecology Elite Class, and Statistics corresponds to the Statistics major. These advantageous disciplines have some appeal for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2024 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Mathematics/Statistics are recommended; Law and Finance/Banking/Economics are differentiated and wait-and-see; Civil Engineering and Architecture are differentiated and wait-and-see; Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are generally wait-and-see. The university's physics category enrollment mainly includes popular engineering and medical majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine, with an overall relatively hot major structure. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Yunnan Province college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (history category 112,406 + physics category 173,282 = 285,688). Estimated by historical proportion, physics category candidates are about 229,200, and the significant expansion of the candidate pool will intensify ranking competition. Yunnan University is located in the provincial capital Kunming and is the only 211 university in Yunnan Province, with a very high proportion of local enrollment (in 2025, the vast majority of the 1,447 physics category plans were for the province). Local candidates have strong application intentions, and regional preference is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21863, an enrollment expansion of about 10.8% in 2026, a significant increase of about 32% in the local candidate pool intensifying competition, and a somewhat negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, the predicted 2026 physics category minimum admission ranking is approximately 23477, with a range of 22977–23977.

Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (such as Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics, New Energy Science and Engineering, Law, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Dual Degree programs, etc.) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Chemistry, Materials, Civil Engineering, Environmental Science, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 22000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including 2021-2024 liberal arts and 2025 history category) were 2558 → 2149 → 4351 → 3662 → 4152, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to a 45-point drop compared to 2022, the ranking plummeted to 4351, rebounded to 3662 in 2024, and shifted back to 4152 in 2025. Over the past three years, rankings have fluctuated within the 3600–4400 range, with a baseline of approximately 4152 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Yunnan Province fluctuated: 337 in 2021 → 218 in 2022 → 288 in 2023 → 405 in 2024 → 271 in 2025 → 321 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 50 students, an increase of about 18.5%, which is relatively large and theoretically would push the ranking number higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years, reaching 71st in 2026. It has strong competitiveness among comprehensive universities in the Southwest region, with a deep liberal arts foundation. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to the university's published employment data showing that the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%, sparking public concern. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd (rated as 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity of 524,656. There are no records of admission gaps. The somewhat negative reputation may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+ (top in the country), corresponding to the enrollment major Ethnology (Donglu Campus), which is the most attractive flagship discipline for liberal arts at the university. Ecology A and Statistics A-, although in the science category, contribute to enhancing the overall academic reputation of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2024 major popularity data shows: Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; Law is divided and wait-and-see; Education/Teacher Training is divided and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The university's history category enrollment mainly includes traditional liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Journalism, and History, with overall major popularity being moderate and divided. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 148,700 history category candidates, and the significant expansion of the candidate pool will intensify ranking competition. Yunnan University is located in the provincial capital Kunming, is the only 211 university in Yunnan Province, has a very high proportion of local enrollment, and local liberal arts candidates have strong willingness to apply, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4152, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18.5%, the significant increase of about 32% in the number of local candidates intensifying competition, and the somewhat negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking for the history category is approximately 4692, with a range of 4192–5192.
